addressedFeedback.finding: External workflow input still materialized an execution-scoped external-mailbox/input/output.json mirror and an unused legacy communication artifact writer remained in source.
addressedFeedback.resolution: Removed the external input output.json mirror, deleted the unused communication-artifact-persistence.ts writer, and updated regressions to assert SQLite workflow_messages.payload_json is authoritative.

verificationCommands: bun test packages/riela/src/workflow/engine.test.ts --test-name-pattern "external mailbox|plain-text human input|sqlite upstream payload"
bun run packages/riela/src/bin.ts workflow validate codex-design-and-implement-review-loop --scope project

rg -n "RIELA_RESOLVED_INPUT_PATH|RIELA_MAILBOX_DIR|RIELA_WORKFLOW_INPUT|RIELA_WORKFLOW_OUTPUT|inbox/input\.json|outbox/output\.json|external-mailbox/input/output\.json|communication-artifact-persistence\.ts" packages/riela/src packages/riela-addons/src README.md design-docs impl-plans -S
bun run packages/riela/src/bin.ts workflow run sqlite-input-smoke --workflow-definition-dir /tmp/riela-sqlite-input-smoke.* --variables '{"humanInput":{"request":"sqlite only"}}' --output json
